---
title: "Sky Qiu"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: img/profile_pic.png
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://x.com/sky_qiu_biostat
    - icon: linkedin
      text: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tq21/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/tq21
---

## Hi!

My name is Sky Qiu. I obtained a PhD in Biostatistics from UC Berkeley in 2025 under the supervision of Professor [Mark van der Laan](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mark_van_der_Laan). My research focuses on developing estimators within the targeted maximum likelihood estimation framework, with applications to integrating randomized controlled trials and external real-world data, two-phase sampling designs, and survival analysis.

## Education

**University of California, Berkeley**

PhD in Biostatistics \| August 2023 - December 2025

MA in Biostatistics \| August 2021 - August 2023

**University of Washington, Seattle**

BS in Data Science and Statistics \| August 2017 - June 2021
